_instructions: REMOVE THIS ENTRY. Replace contents of this file with entries from the Kuwait MOFA National List (UN Resolution 1373).
_how_to_update: Visit https://www.mofa.gov.kw/en/pagesNational_List and manually copy the names into this file. Update whenever MOFA publishes changes.

_format.name: Primary sanctioned name in English (required)
_format.name_arabic: Primary name in Arabic if available
